Judge: Cynthia Ming-Mei Lee , Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Jay Solanki is present.
Attorney Arnold Walter Evje for the plaintiff.
Defendants Timothy Richmond and Lauren Norwood are present.
Attorney Matthew Show appearing for defendants in limited scope.

The Judge, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of January 23, 2017 is vacated. (501)
